TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_banday

S.FORM: e yau usiq a sunis maded.
S.TRANSL: There is a child who is sitting.

S.FORM: ta ngayauanna wasu ti titu ngid nanum.
S.TRANSL: In front of him, a dog wants to drink water.
The child is sleeping in the room.
He takes care of a frog.

S.FORM: nyana smani kasianeman na sunis maynep taqaynepan.
S.TRANSL: 不知道在房間睡覺的小孩想什麼?
What is the child who is sleeping in the room thinking about?

S.FORM: yau tangayauanna ya usiq a zpu.
S.TRANSL: In front of him are a pair of shoes.

S.FORM: yau mawRat a Ru tu wasu.
sunis ‘nay Runanay nani mawRat tu qawRat tu ninu.
maRaw tu ta Rwa tatian nani.
ni yau takinilanna ya titu ‘nay qmeRas.

S.TRANSL: The child is looking outwards from the window.

S.FORM: en qmapaR sunis tu ti tu wasu ya Runanay ‘nay.
tawian ta tapaRinan kayta ay maded a sunis nani.
S.TRANSL: The child sits on the tree (branch).

S.FORM: mana mani muRing ya sunis ‘nay nani.

S.TRANSL: The child is on top of the tree.

S.FORM: yau ti tabuRangan na qmRas a sunis ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: By the rock, the child shouted.
There is a turtle under the rock.

S.FORM: takinilan ‘nay nani tabuRangan ‘nay mzukat a siRmuq.
S.TRANSL: 在石頭旁邊跑出一隻鹿來。
Beside the rock, a deer ran out.

S.FORM: nani tmibuq ti ya sunis ‘nay nani.
tmayta ya siRmuq ’nay tu sunis nani ngid ti qatibuq.
S.TRANSL: 鹿看小孩掉下去,自己也差一點掉下去。
The deer saw the child fall down, and it almost fell.

S.FORM: talibengna yau usiq a wasu mlana.
tmibuq ti ta zanuman a lazat.
S.TRANSL: The person fell into the water.

S.FORM: nani yau tababaw a siRmuq tmayta mlinamaw ti ya sunis ‘nay nani.
S.TRANSL: 鹿從上面看那小孩浮出水面。
The deer saw the child floating on the water.

S.FORM: yau a wasu tababawan na sunis.
S.TRANSL: The dog is on the child.

S.FORM: yau ti ya wasu masulun tu wasu ‘nay ta paRinan buRang ya mawRat.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗和另一隻狗在木頭那裡玩。
The dog plays with another dog around the wood.
小孩和狗在木頭那裡玩。
The child plays with the dog around the wood.

S.FORM: mlizaq mawRat maded tapaRinan maded ti ka ya wasu ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 喜歡玩就坐下來,狗也坐在木頭那邊。
(The child) liked to play so (he) sat down. The dog also sat by the wood.
之前玩的時候小孩很高興。
He enjoyed the time when he played.

S.FORM: ya mzukat ti ya iRem tawian ta ngayauan na sunis ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 穿山甲跑出來,到小孩前面。
A pangolin comes out in front of the child.
